reviews.review_description: Decent bit of maps and cool mechanics, my favorite maps is caves water, when in caves go theough the water and have fun!

I do commonly play VR but I haven't had this much fun in a while, I'm glad I logged on as soon as I could since I got the peak experience with the devs, I got hendy to show me around, I got kicked by grim, I got sucked from a black hole, and last but certainly not least I got sent to the void

10/10 highly recommend

Also this is very inspiring, I used to think kids can't make good games which is why I never tried even though I can code, and because of how good this is I will admit I was proved wrong
I walk around this mystical world and see glorious faces roaming around with vibrant beautiful eyes
To Be For Real Monkey Time Might Be One Of The Chill Games I've Ever Played Before. The Maps Where Pretty Fun To Explore And Even Relaxing I Highly Recommend Playing!
